name: WD_CLOCK_RESERVATION
description: Reservation finish time display combining course progress and reservation time. Shows when wash will complete with date, AM/PM, hour, minute. Includes course info and progress status. Theme-aware styling.
visualForm: Course info section → reservation time display (date, AM/PM, HH:MM) → progress information below
descriptionKo: 코스 진행 정보와 예약 완료 시간을 함께 표시하는 세탁 예약 위젯입니다. 날짜, AM/PM, 시/분과 코스 정보를 통합해 보여주며 테마 색상을 지원합니다.
descriptionEn: Reservation finish time display combining course progress and reservation time. Shows when wash will complete with date, AM/PM, hour, minute. Includes course info and progress status. Theme-aware styling.
